name: whatsapp
description: Work with WhatsApp chats, message context, media, and reviewable drafts from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Read chats and prepare approved replies
interface.longDescription: Use WhatsApp conversation context, inspect media, create reviewable local drafts, and send only when the exact recipient and message have been approved.
defaultPrompt: Read the latest messages in a WhatsApp chat
Draft a WhatsApp reply for review
